authority_boundary: Track E4 evidence is non-authoritative. Only an explicitly approved human-reviewed merge of the exact frozen candidate may perform the M15 repository completion transition. Tag and GitHub Release publication remain separate human-controlled post-merge actions. Decision Proof sealing and Learning Proof sealing remain AAOS-owned; no evaluator may accept risk, close an audit, grant a waiver, or transfer authority.
